---
title: "Midterm Test"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

## Part A: Data 

```{r}
library(glue)
library(rio)
library(dplyr)
library(remotes)
```

```{r}
download_file <- function(year) {
  link <- glue::glue("https://www.oregon.gov/ode/educator-resources/assessment/TestResults20{year}/pagr_schools_ela_raceethnicity_{year-1}{year}.xlsx")
  rio::import(link, setclass = "tibble", na = c("-", "--", "*"))
}
```

1.  

```{r}
all_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  download_file(15),
  download_file(16),
  download_file(17),
  download_file(18)
)

View(all_data)
head(all_data)
```

```{r}
clean_data <- all_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Student Group` %in% c("White", "Hispanic/Latino")) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    academic_year = `Academic Year`,
    district = District,
    school = School,
    student_group = `Student Group`,
    grade_level = `Grade Level`,
    `Number Level 1`,
    `Number Level 2`,
    `Number Level 3`,
    `Number Level 4`
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = dplyr::starts_with("Number Level"),
    names_to = "level",
    values_to = "n"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    level = stringr::str_remove(level, "Number Level ")
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(n)
```

```{r}
names(all_data)

```

```{r}
head(clean_data)
```

2.  

```{r}
clean_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(
    academic_year,
    district,
    student_group,
    level
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    n = sum(n),
    n_schools = dplyr::n_distinct(school),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = student_group,
    values_from = n
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(`Hispanic/Latino`, White)
```

# **Part B: Achievement disparities**

```{r}
#install.packages("remotes")
install.packages("gapr")
```
